title: Voyage to the Planet of Prehistoric Women
original_title: Voyage to the Planet of Prehistoric Women
overview: Astronauts crash-land on Venus and find themselves in trouble when they kill a monster that is worshipped by a group of Venusian women. Re-edited version of Soviet sci-fi  Planet of Storms (1962) by Pavel Klushantsev, dubbed into English with additional scenes.
